name: Aleph Finance Group Plc
summary: Aleph Finance Group PLC, a holding company, provides investment management and advisory services to high net worth individuals, families, and companies worldwide. It offers wealth management services, such as managed accounts, advisory mandates, portfolio allocation, and risk analysis; and fund management products, including UCITS funds, alternative funds, marketing and placement, and risk management services; The company also provides capital market services, which include corporate finance, listing and placements, investors relations, club deals, and crowdfunding; and financial services comprise compliance oversight, securitization vehicles, and certificates and fund set up products, as well as a regulatory umbrella. Aleph Finance Group PLC was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
